{{Relic Infobox|Archaic Tooth|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Transform|2}}
{{R|Archaic Tooth||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} that replaces one of your {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Basic|Starter Cards|2}} (not including Strikes or Defends) with an upgraded {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} version.

== Obtaining Archaic Tooth ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 2|Act 2|2}}, can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.

== Notes ==
The transformed cards you can obtain are as follows:
* '''Ironclad''': {{C|Bash||2}} -> {{C|Break||2}}
* '''Silent''': {{C|Neutralize||2}} -> {{C|Suppress||2}}
* '''Regent''': {{C|Falling Star||2}} -> {{C|Meteor Shower||2}}
* '''Necrobinder''': {{C|Unleash||2}} -> {{C|Protector||2}}
* '''Defect''': {{C|Dualcast||2}} -> {{C|Quadcast||2}}

* If the original card was {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} and/or {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}}, the resulting {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} card will also be {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} and/or {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}}.

== Trivia ==
* If you have the egg for the respective card ({{R|Molten Egg||2}} for {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}}, {{R|Toxic Egg||2}} for {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skills|2}}) before transforming the card, after taking {{R|Archaic Tooth||2}} the {{2|Transform|Transformed}} card will then be {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}}.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Archaic Tooth to the game.
